title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Yamato, Page One, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, you guys! Stop screwing around and call a doctor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, don't let those two get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Head them off and let me know where they end up!

dialogue.speaker: Page One
dialogue.text: But what about you, page one- San...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: you took a pretty big hit before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Oh, they hurt me so, pay pay!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're hurt, then rest, you psycho- path!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You wanna try saying that again!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're using Kaido-Sama's Thunder Bagua!? You think you can roll with the grownups!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It was more like a thunder sigja!*

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Page one-sama! Yamato-Sama and straw hat have stopped moving!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Don't leave me, you little bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell... Dinosaur 20ans are crazy tough...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait! I told you, I'm not going to harm you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I told you, I'm in a hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where are you even going!? I'm not gonna just drop everything and follow some person I don't know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Just want to do this somewhere else!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: We were told to stop YAMato-SAMA, BUT...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: How are we supposed to do that!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This reminds me all the more of him...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 43 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
